steps.title: Find $x$
steps.content: So $x=15$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice C is correct. The given system of linear equations can be solved by the substitution method. Substituting $-3x$ for $y$ from the first equation in the given system into the second equation yields $4x+\left(-3x\right)=15$, or $x=15$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect. This is the absolute value of $y$, not the value of $x$.
